subcodes.first_line: O daughter of My brother! Hearken unto the Call from the direction of thy Lord's mercy, the Most Exalted, the All-Glorious. Verily, there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بنت اخی ان استمعی الندا من شطر رحمه ربک العلی الابهی انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God
